title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Samsung India Electronics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Samsung India Electronics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Samsung India Electronics has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Samsung India Electronics:
Samsung India Electronics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung India Electronics!
